backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for a gym management system defining data types (members, diets, workouts, packages, attendance, videos) and in-memory state maps; includes mixins for authorization and blob storage, plus helper functions like membership activity checks.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing two high-confidence features related to fixing the member login flow: correct authentication via useMemberAuth, localStorage persistence, navigation to MemberDashboard, and backend getMemberByMembershipId validation.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key implementation details of components, hooks, pages, and utilities in the React frontend.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file with Tailwind directives and OKLCH-based CSS custom property color tokens for both light and dark themes, covering background, foreground, primary, sidebar, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that sets the page title to 'RawFit Gym - Think Fit, Be Fit' and mounts the React app via a module script pointing to src/main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for login selection, admin/member login, and dashboards; the member-dashboard route uses a beforeLoad guard that reads localStorage synchronously to redirect unauthenticated users to /member-login.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Displays an access-denied card with a logout button that clears Internet Identity session and React Query cache when the user lacks permission to access the app.
frontend/src/components/admin/Attendance: Admin tab for managing gym attendance, supporting manual check-in/check-out for selected members and displaying attendance history with method and status badges, plus a QR code generator.
frontend/src/components/admin/DashboardT: Admin dashboard overview showing stat cards for total members, diet charts, workout charts, and packages, along with pause request notifications and quick-action guidance.
frontend/src/components/admin/DietFormDi: A dialog form for creating or editing a diet chart, allowing admins to add/remove meals with nutritional fields and submitting via create or update mutations.
frontend/src/components/admin/DietsTab.t: Admin tab that lists all diet charts in a searchable card grid, with options to create new charts or edit existing ones via DietFormDialog.
frontend/src/components/admin/GymQRCodeG: Generates and displays a time-stamped QR code for gym attendance check-in/out, auto-refreshing every 30 minutes with a countdown badge and download option.
frontend/src/components/admin/MemberForm: A dialog form for creating or editing gym member profiles, supporting fields like package, diet/workout assignment, membership dates, and discount (flat or percentage) with live price preview.
frontend/src/components/admin/MembersTab: Admin tab that lists all gym members in a searchable card grid, showing membership status badges and package info, with actions to create or edit members via MemberFormDialog.
frontend/src/components/admin/PackageFor: A dialog form for creating or updating membership packages, capturing package type, duration in months, and price in INR with a formatted price preview.
frontend/src/components/admin/PackagesTa: Admin tab that displays all membership packages in a searchable card grid with edit and delete (with confirmation dialog) actions, and a button to create new packages.
frontend/src/components/admin/PauseReque: Admin notification card component that displays pending membership pause requests with approve/deny actions, including confirmation dialogs with optional admin messages.
Admin tab component showing all pause requests in separate pending and processed tables, with approve/deny dialog actions and status badges.
frontend/src/components/admin/VideoLibra: Admin tab for browsing and managing workout videos, featuring a searchable grid of video cards and a button to open the video upload dialog.
frontend/src/components/admin/VideoUploa: Dialog form for uploading a new workout video with title, category, description, and file input fields, including upload progress tracking via ExternalBlob.
frontend/src/components/admin/WorkoutFor: Dialog form for creating or editing a workout chart, supporting dynamic addition and removal of exercises with sets, reps, and instructions fields.
frontend/src/components/admin/WorkoutsTa: Admin tab component for managing workout charts, displaying a searchable grid of workout cards with create/edit functionality via a dialog.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: React class-based error boundary that catches render errors and displays an alert with the error message and a 'Try Again' button that resets state or reloads the page.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header component showing the RawFit Gym logo, name, and tagline alongside a user avatar dropdown menu with profile info and a logout action that clears the Internet Identity session and query cache.
frontend/src/components/member/MemberDas: Member dashboard tab showing membership details, QR attendance card, and pause/resume membership controls with status feedback.
frontend/src/components/member/MemberHea: Sticky header for the member portal displaying the gym logo, member name/avatar, and a dropdown menu with logout option.
frontend/src/components/member/MemberMem: Card component that displays a member's current membership status (active, paused, expired) and shows alerts for pending or denied pause requests.
frontend/src/components/member/MemberVid: Member video library tab that enforces gym-proximity location checks before allowing access to assigned workout videos.
frontend/src/components/member/QRAttenda: Card component that verifies the member's GPS location and uses a QR scanner to record gym check-in/check-out attendance.
frontend/src/components/ProductionVersio: Displays an alert banner when the reported app version doesn't match the expected production version, with options for a hard refresh to clear browser cache.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that prompts new users to enter their name and email to complete their profile, submitting via the saveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) actors, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing login/logout state via DFINITY's AuthClient and exposing identity, login status, and helper flags to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useMemberAuth.ts: Hook that manages gym member authentication state (login/logout) using membership ID validation against the backend actor, persisting auth state to localStorage and syncing across browser tabs.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including members, diet/workout charts, membership packages, attendance, and videos for both admin and member use cases.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind CSS and defines light/dark mode CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens and UI component variables.
frontend/src/lib/currencyUtils.ts: Utility functions for formatting numeric values as Indian Rupees (INR) using the Intl API, including per-month breakdowns and coercion from legacy dollar-formatted strings.
frontend/src/lib/locationUtils.ts: Utility functions for geolocation verification, including Haversine distance calculation and checking whether a user's current browser location is within an authorized radius of the gym.
frontend/src/lib/memberAuthLogger.ts: A singleton logging utility for member authentication flows that provides structured, leveled log entries with masked member IDs and unique attempt IDs for each login session.
frontend/src/lib/qrCodeUtils.ts: Utility functions for generating, parsing, and validating QR codes used in gym attendance scanning, including checksum generation/verification and timestamp validity checks.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClient and InternetIdentity providers wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page with a tabbed interface covering Dashboard, Members, Diets, Workouts, Packages, Attendance, Videos, and Pause Requests sections.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLoginPage.tsx: Admin login page that uses Internet Identity authentication, displaying branding on the left and a login card on the right with error handling and retry logic.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Empty login page file with no content.
frontend/src/pages/LoginSelectionPage.ts: Landing page presenting two login options—Member Login (by membership ID) and Admin Login (via Internet Identity)—as clickable cards with navigation to their respective routes.
frontend/src/pages/MemberDashboard.tsx: Member dashboard page that fetches member data by membership ID and renders a tabbed layout with Dashboard and Video Library tabs, redirecting to login if no member ID is found.
frontend/src/pages/MemberLoginPage.tsx: React page component for member login that accepts a Membership ID, calls the useMemberAuth login hook, and navigates to the member dashboard on success or displays errors on failure.
frontend/src/release/expectedProductionV: Defines the expected production version string (v1.4.9.0) and exports utilities to compare and report on whether the backend's reported version matches the expected version.
Defines the smoke test checklist items (health, admin, member categories) for Version 49 and exports helper functions to compute per-category and overall completion progress.
frontend/src/release/SmokeTestOverlay.ts: Dialog overlay component for production smoke testing that displays a checklist of health, admin, and member flow items with progress tracking, auto-checking health items based on live backend health data.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routes, with helpers to persist values to sessionStorage and clean sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with OKLCH-based design tokens for colors, border radii, shadows, and accordion animations, plus typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing two known fix requests: repairing the member login flow on MemberLoginPage and auditing the backend getMemberByMembershipId logic and useMemberAuth response handling.
